title: Bulk Add Automations to Existing Boards

posts.author: MyManMonday.com (Gideon Harris)
posts.cookedHtml:
A feature that would be really useful to add is a bulk automations pattern applier.

Use case:

You have 5 existing boards, and you want to set an automation that when the status changes to “Done” it automatically creates an update.

Right now it’s a pain to have to go into each board and manually create that automation over an over again. It’s not a huge deal if it’s only a few, but when you start to reach 20+ it becomes really time consuming.

I’m requesting a feature that would allow you to bulk apply automations based on an automation template.

When you have the automation built, you select the boards you want it to apply to, and it applies that automation to the selected boards.

posts.author: Warren_Miller (Warren)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be really useful. Would anyone have a workaround at all?
